title: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!
